title: Grand Finale
description: Can only be played if there are no cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Deal 60 damage to ALL enemies.
upgraded_description: Can only be played if there are no cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Deal 75 damage to ALL enemies.
notes: Can only be played when the Draw Pile is completely empty. This unique playstyle condition makes it a powerful finishing move.
